array.string: ROOT="/Volumes/2TB/MAS/VioDashboard"; MODE_FILE="$ROOT/launchd/.run-mode"; MODE="source"; if [ -f "$MODE_FILE" ]; then MODE="$(tr -d '[:space:]' < "$MODE_FILE")"; fi; if [ "$MODE" = "runtime" ]; then TARGET="$HOME/Library/Application Support/VioDashboardRuntime"; else TARGET="$ROOT"; fi; mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/Logs/VioDashboard" && cd "$TARGET" && export VIO_WRAPPER_PROJECT_ROOT="/Volumes/2TB/MAS" && export VIO_WRAPPER_CONFIG_PATH="/Users/visen24/MAS/openclaw_state_fork/openclaw.json" && export VIO_WRAPPER_GATEWAY_PORT="19001" && exec /opt/homebrew/bin/node src/server.mjs >> "$HOME/Library/Logs/VioDashboard/wrapper.out.log" 2>> "$HOME/Library/Logs/VioDashboard/wrapper.err.log"
